# TraceIngested

> Fired after a new trace is recorded via OTLP ingestion

**Channel:** webhook

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| traceId | string | yes | - |
| spanCount | number | yes | - |
| organizationId | string | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `afterCreate`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `buildTraceView`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
